other_observers: David Leatherman Janeal Thompson Dotti Russell Duane Nelson Brandon Percival Gene Rutherford Jensen Stulp; Yes
specific_location: in the farm yard 5 miles south of Lamar on Highway 287 and about a quarter of a mile to the west
description: -blackish crown -yellow neck (except in center back) -rufous cheek patch and rufous color above eye (yellow immediately above and beneath eye) -olive green back with black streaking, yellow over the rump -olive green wings with white greater coverts -yellow throat and breast with black streaking -whitish under lower belly and undertail coverts -black bill and black legsBehaviors: -first appeared at water feature in a feeding frenzy -flying almost straight up and down about 12" (appearance of jumping) catching flying insects mid air -feeding in weed patches and lower branches of pinions and junipers where there were groups of small flying insects near water -after a couple of hours not so frantically feeding but still focused on feeding enough that not much attention was paid to the observers -fed in the open which made easy observationsCall: I did not hear itPlumage: adult male
photographer: Photographer: Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp, Jane Stulp
